zh.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin是Guillaume de Mauvoisin和Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour的兒子，於1167年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯曼-拉-喬利。他於1190年之前與Aélis de Porhoët在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年在法國享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin是Guillaume de Mauvoisin和Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour的儿子，于1167年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯曼-拉-喬利。他于1190年之前与Aélis de Porhoët在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1211年在法国享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin was born in 1167, in Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France as the son of Guillaume de Mauvoisin and Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour. He married Aélis de Porhoët before 1190, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1211, in France, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin est né en 1167, à Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, fils de Guillaume de Mauvoisin et Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour. Il a épousé Aélis de Porhoët avant 1190, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1211, à France, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin wurde 1167 in Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Guillaume de Mauvoisin und Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour geboren. Er hat vor 1190 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Aélis de Porhoët geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1211 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin è nato il nel 1167 nel Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia come figlio di Guillaume de Mauvoisin e Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour. Lui sposato Aélis de Porhoët prima del 1190, nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1211, nel Francia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisinは1167年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスマンテス-ラ-ジョリーでGuillaume de MauvoisinとAdeline Du Bosc De Maudétourの息子として生まれた。1190年以前にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンでAélis de Porhoëtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1211年にフランスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin(은)는 1167년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 먼티스-라-조리에서 Guillaume de Mauvoisin(와)과 Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1190년 이전 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 Aélis de Porhoët(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 프랑스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin nasceu em 1167, em Mantes-la-Jolie, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França filho de Guillaume de Mauvoisin e Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour. Ele casou-se com Aélis de Porhoët antes 1190, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1211, em França, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Guy V de Mauvoisin родился в 1167 г. в местности мантес-ла-джоли, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его родителей звали Guillaume de Mauvoisin и Adeline Du Bosc De Maudétour. Он женился на женщине по имени Aélis de Porhoët перед 1190 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1211 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 44 лет.
